response.justification: Candidate is heavily overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, with 15+ years of experience including Staff and Senior titles. Strong TypeScript/Node.js background, React experience via Optilyz, AWS exposure, Kubernetes familiarity, and clean-code/TDD orientation align well with the stack and nice-to-haves. However, seniority mismatch raises retention and salary-fit concerns, PostgreSQL experience is not explicitly demonstrated (MongoDB/MySQL instead), and German is only basic which may conflict with the high on-site presence in a German construction-tech context.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience plus AWS/Kubernetes exposure matching nice-to-haves
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) fits the 'clean software architecture' interest
Already based in Berlin, supporting the on-site requirement
concerns: Significant seniority overshoot for a junior/mid role — likely salary expectations and retention risk
No explicit PostgreSQL experience listed; databases shown are MongoDB and MySQL
Only basic German, which may limit collaboration in an energy-consulting/construction domain
